name: Graph Visualization
summary: Interactive graph visualization using ReactFlow with automatic Dagre layout. Supports custom node types for different spec levels, zoom/pan controls, node click handling, and both specs and architect graph modes.
goals: Render spec nodes as an interactive graph with automatic layout
Support custom node types for different spec levels (project, domain, feature)
Provide zoom, pan, and click interaction on graph nodes
Support both specs graph and architect graph modes

design.overview: FlowGraph wraps @xyflow/react's ReactFlow component. Dagre algorithm computes automatic layout for node positions. Custom GraphNodes render different node types. SpecsGraph and ArchitectGraph wrap FlowGraph with domain-specific styling.

acceptanceCriteria.then: nodes are rendered in a hierarchical layout with edges connecting parent-child relationships
the detail panel shows the node's content and metadata

end-to-end.given: Spec data with multiple levels exists
end-to-end.then: nodes are rendered hierarchically with proper edges and styling

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
